untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires identifying 'well-formed top with multiple minor peaks at same price level' and 'lower trend line with one or more touches'. These are visual/structural pattern elements that cannot be precisely encoded using only the allowed point-in-time indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position). The signal requires multi-bar pattern recognition and trend line fitting logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated entry as a Donchian channel breakout above (close > dc_upper) as a proxy for upward breakout detection, and exit as a break below the lower channel (close < dc_lower) as a reversal signal. However, the core pattern structure (well-formed top verification, trend line validation) cannot be accurately represented. Success rate (10% average rise) and market regime (BULL_MARKET) are documented but not directly testable without regime classification input.
